title: thelypteris adenostegia
intro: Thelypteris adenostegia, also known as the American maidenhair fern, is a species of fern in the family Thelypteridaceae. It is native to North America and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The plant has been used to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and respiratory problems, and its health benefits include reducing inflammation and fighting infections. Herbal preparations of Thelypteris adenostegia include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be made by steeping the plant's leaves in hot water or a solvent like ethanol.
